parameters: I'm a dragon fanatic. Before they made me into a slave, my collection
of stuffed dragons was my pride and joy.
I had loads of other dragon goods too, but it was all taken by Tolkia
*Siiigh*... I can't die and leave things this way. I had a really rare
The demons have taken over Tolkia! I got all my stuff back!
It was you, wasn't it!? I knew it! You conquered Tolkia and won the
Here, this is my greatest treasure! I want you to have it!
Huh? What is it? Hahaha! Don't make me say it out loud!
It's a super-rare good that'll fetch a pretty penny if you sell it.
Or maybe it'll end up helping you out?
